author: Wim Oosthuizen
title: Piece of cake
content: It's so easy to change a picture of a singer or band, give an album the right name or to change the genre. It's the money more than worthwhile!

author: Misterbobo88
title: So easy to change the covers to my audiobooks
content: I wanted to just update the covers on my audiobooks so they all match and this does it effortlessly and flawlessly! 10/10
